definition:
1. a surname  or additional name;  the accusative being used absolute as adverb, by surname , Ἀστυάναξ, ὃν Τρῶες ἐπίκλησιν καλέουσι Astyanax, as they call him by surname  (his name being Scamandrius), (Iliad by Homer), etc. 
2. generally, a name , (Thucydides) 
3. an imputation , (Thucydides) 
4. a calling upon, invocation, appeal , (Plutarch) (ML)
